feedback: AutoETS beat SeasonalNaive baseline by 1.7pp WAPE
lesson_text: For high-volatility, weak-seasonality series, **AutoETS** achieved 17.4% WAPE — 4.0pp better than GradientBoosting. Statistical model exploited the weak seasonality pattern effectively.
